title: cyperus orbicephalus
intro: Cyperus orbicephalus, also known as the globe-headed flatsedge, is a type of aquatic plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of Cyperus orbicephalus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Cyperus orbicephalus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
